mapper.select: SELECT * FROM artists ORDER BY createdAt DESC
SELECT * FROM artists WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM artists WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY createdAt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO artists (name, fansCount, monthlyListeners, biography, avatarUrl, avatarNetworkUrl) VALUES (#{name}, #{fansCount}, #{monthlyListeners}, #{biography}, #{avatarUrl}, #{avatarNetworkUrl})
